entity.label: Mikloth
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: An officer under Dodai, in the time of David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:4).

nodes.label: Mikloth
nodes.description: An officer under Dodai, in the time of David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:4).

verses.text: And over the course of the second month was Dodai an Ahohite, and of his course was Mikloth also the ruler: in his course likewise were twenty and four thousand.
